title: 7 Best MailerLite Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare top MailerLite alternatives. Find the best email marketing tool for your needs with our detailed comparison.
intro: While MailerLite excels as a budget-friendly email marketing platform for small businesses, other tools may better suit specific needs like e-commerce, newsletter publishing, or advanced automation. Whether you're outgrowing MailerLite's features or seeking specialized functionality, we've identified the top alternatives worth considering.
why_switch: Need advanced automation and CRM capabilities beyond email marketing
Looking for industry-specific features like e-commerce integrations or webinar hosting
Require higher subscriber limits or different pricing structures for your growth stage

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out with built-in monetization features, an ad network, and referral programs specifically designed for newsletter publishers. It offers 2,500 free subscribers compared to MailerLite's 1,000, making it ideal for growing newsletters focused on revenue generation.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an exceptional free tier with 100,000 contacts and includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. It's the best choice if you need multi-channel communication and transactional email APIs without breaking the budget.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit specializes in serving creators with visual automation workflows, subscriber tagging, and integrated commerce features. It provides 1,000 free subscribers and superior tools for building audience relationships and selling digital products.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines powerful marketing automation with integrated CRM, lead scoring, and dynamic content personalization. It's the top choice for growing businesses ready to invest in enterprise-level features beyond basic email marketing.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is the most established player in email marketing with 20+ years of history and robust A/B testing capabilities. While it has a smaller free tier (500 contacts), its platform maturity and extensive integrations make it a reliable alternative for growing businesses.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely bundles email marketing with native webinar hosting, online course creation, and conversion funnels. It's ideal for educators and entrepreneurs who want a comprehensive platform for building and monetizing digital products.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with deep Shopify and WooCommerce integrations, predictive analytics, and SMS capabilities. It's the best choice if you're running an online store and need sophisticated customer journey automation tied to purchase behavior.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to MailerLite?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 contacts plus multi-channel features including SMS and WhatsApp. If you prefer a pure email solution, Beehiiv provides 2,500 free subscribers with newsletter-specific features, or ConvertKit offers 1,000 free subscribers optimized for creators.

faq.q: What is the best MailerLite alternative for small business?
faq.a: Mailchimp and Brevo are excellent for small businesses, offering established platforms with strong feature sets. Brevo edges ahead with lower costs and multi-channel capabilities, while Mailchimp provides more integrations and platform maturity if budget is less of a concern.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to MailerLite?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper for growing lists, offering up to 100,000 free contacts versus MailerLite's 1,000. Beehiiv and ConvertKit also provide 2,500+ free subscribers at no cost, though their paid tiers start higher ($39 and $29 respectively vs. MailerLite's $9).
